pages.title: Housing Disrepair Team
pages.text: Housing Disrepair Team is a trading style of Instant Assist Ltd and is a claims management company authorised by the FCA (FRN:969934). No-win-no-fee housing disrepair claims against councils and housing associations. gtag.js loads unconditionally, property G-09Q87D69P6. Contact form: name field_1, phone field_2, council field_5_1, housing association field_5_2, marketing consent field_6_1, type field_17.
